Description: Built-in: launches Command Prompt (Admin)

Description: Built-in: launches PowerShell

Description: Built-in: launches PowerShell (Admin)

Description: Built-in: launches Registry Editor

Name: WinDirStat (x64)
Description: WinDirStat (x64) - Disk usage statistics viewer

Name: WinDirStat (ARM)
Description: WinDirStat (ARM) - Disk usage statistics viewer

Name: WinDirStat (ARM64)
Description: WinDirStat (ARM64) - Disk usage statistics viewer

Name: WinDirStat (x86)
Description: WinDirStat (x86) - Disk usage statistics viewer

Name: 2Browse.exe
Description: 2Browse.exe - File browser with built-in file preview and hex viewer

Name: Advanced IP Scanner
Description: Advanced IP Scanner - Network discovery and diagnostics tool

Name: Advanced Port Scanner
Description: Advanced Port Scanner - Network discovery and diagnostics tool

Name: AllDup Portable
Description: AllDup Portable - File deduplication tool

Name: BlueScreenView
Description: BlueScreenView - Blue screen crash analysis tool

Name: CrystalDisk Info Portable
Description: CrystalDisk Info Portable - Disk information and health monitoring tool

Name: HWiNFO32
Description: HWiNFO32 - System information and monitoring tool

Name: HWiNFO64
Description: HWiNFO64 - System information and monitoring tool

Name: HWiNFO_ARM64
Description: HWiNFO_ARM64 - System information and monitoring tool

Name: PUTTY
Description: PUTTY - SSH and Telnet client

Name: RecoverKeys
Description: RecoverKeys - Product key recovery tool

Name: Sysinternals Suite
Description: Extracts Sysinternals Suite and opens folder in Explorer

Name: Configure NTP
Description: Configure NTP settings and time service with included auto time zone detection script (requires elevation - UAC prompt)

Name: Get Shutdown Event Logs
Description: Retrieves shutdown event logs from the local machine and saves them to a text file on the desktop (requires elevation - UAC prompt)

Name: Get MSI Event Logs
Description: Retrieves MSI event logs from the local machine and saves them to a text file on the desktop (requires elevation - UAC prompt)

Name: Get Windows Update History
Description: Retrieves Windows Update history logs from the local machine and saves them to a CSV file on the desktop (requires elevation - UAC prompt)

Name: Get Active Directory Computers
Description: Retrieves Active Directory computer information and saves it to a CSV file on the desktop (must be run on Domain Controller or machine with AD PowerShell module and appropriate permissions - UAC prompt for elevation)

Name: Get Active Directory Users
Description: Retrieves Active Directory user information and saves it to a CSV file on the desktop (must be run on Domain Controller or machine with AD PowerShell module and appropriate permissions - UAC prompt for elevation)

Name: Get Expired Passwords
Description: Retrieves Active Directory users with passwords expiring within 14 days and saves the information to a CSV file on the desktop (must be run on Domain Controller or machine with AD PowerShell module and appropriate permissions - UAC prompt for elevation)

Name: SentinelOne Load Agent
Description: Loads the SentinelOne agent using SentinelCtl.exe (requires elevation - UAC prompt for elevation)

Name: SentinelOne Reload Agent
Description: Reloads the SentinelOne agent using SentinelCtl.exe and prompts for the passphrase (requires elevation - UAC prompt for elevation)

Name: SentinelOne Rebind Agent
Description: Rebinds the SentinelOne agent to a new site using SentinelCtl.exe and prompts for the site token and passphrase (requires elevation - UAC prompt for elevation)

Name: Datto RMM Reinstall Agent
Description: Reinstalls the Datto RMM agent prompts for the site ID (requires elevation - UAC prompt for elevation)
